# EntityNotCreatedException class

The exception that is thrown when an actor passes an entity id to [`Load`](../EntityDb.Common.Transactions/TransactionBuilder-1/Load.md) with an entity id that loads with a version number of zero.

```csharp
public sealed class EntityNotCreatedException : Exception
```
